ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "shares" REAL /* Number of shares owned */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the stock */,
  "notional_value" REAL /* Notional value of the stock */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List identifier */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "exchange" INTEGER /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Average daily trading volume of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of companies in the sector */,
  "num_companies" INTEGER /* Number of companies in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the stock exchange */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_days" TEXT /* Days on which the stock exchange operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, portfolio_manager, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Weight of the stock in the portfolio
Sector in which the company operates
Stock Exchange Daily Official List identifier
Stock exchange where the stock is listed
Earnings per share of the stock
Average daily trading volume of the stock
Currency in which the stock is traded
Total market capitalization of companies in the sector
Number of companies in the sector
Unique identifier for each stock exchange
Opening time of the stock exchange
Closing time of the stock exchange
Days on which the stock exchange operates
Role of the user (e.g., admin, portfolio_manager, analyst)
Timestamp of when the user account was created
Timestamp of the user's last login
